commands.author: charles-openclaw
commands.command: thanks for the review. i cannot honestly provide live configured-channel output from this contributor environment without using private local channel/account state. what i can provide safely here is the focused behavior proof already run on the changed path: - `pnpm_config_offline=true corepack pnpm test src/commands/status.scan.test.ts -- --reporter=dot` passes 1 file / 12 tests. - the new regression verifies the default text status path forwards live `channels.status` data after a reachable gateway probe. - the setup fallback still avoids live channel status, matching the fast-path guardrails for missing/unreachable gateway state. i am leaving the real live-channel proof item for a maintainer or disposable configured-channel environment rather than using private local runtime state.
commands.freeform_prompt: Thanks for the review. I cannot honestly provide live configured-channel output from this contributor environment without using private local channel/account state. What I can provide safely here is the focused behavior proof already run on the changed path: - `PNPM_CONFIG_OFFLINE=true corepack pnpm test src/commands/status.scan.test.ts -- --reporter=dot` passes 1 file / 12 tests. - The new regression verifies the default text status path forwards live `channels.status` data after a reachable gateway probe. - The setup fallback still avoids live channel status, matching the fast-path guardrails for missing/unreachable gateway state. I am leaving the real live-channel proof item for a maintainer or disposable configured-channel environment rather than using private local runtime state.

target.title: fix(status): show live channel state in fast status
target.author: charles-openclaw
